title: crotalaria harleyi
intro: Crotalaria harleyi is a species of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae. It is native to Australia and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The plant contains bioactive compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it beneficial for reducing pain and inflammation, as well as fighting infections. In traditional herbal medicine, Crotalaria harleyi is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although its safety and efficacy should be further studied.
